title: Lab 06: Shared Setgid Directory
description: Build a collaborative directory that uses both setgid and sticky semantics.

tasks: Create the group analystsx and the directory /shared/analysts with owner root, group analystsx, and access limited to root and members of analystsx.
Configure /shared/analysts so new files inherit the analystsx group and only the file owner, the directory owner, or root can remove entries from it.
hints: A collaborative drop directory often needs both setgid and sticky semantics.
Use a single chmod invocation to express the final mode cleanly.
solution_outline: Create the group and directory tree.
Apply the final ownership and mode 3770.
Verify the directory mode with stat or ls -ld.
task_titles: Enable setgid and sticky behavior on the directory
